title: Structureless
description: Removes all vanilla structures. No more strongholds, villages, etc.
body:
Removes all vanilla structures. No more strongholds, villages, mineshafts, etc. Structures are removed through json files, not mixins. There should be minimal interference with other mods.

If enough of you want a splinter mod that keeps essential gameplay structures like the stronghold and endcity while still removing villages and such (so you can still get to the end and all that) please let me know!

This mod was initially a part of a bigger mod, Survival Recrafted, but i felt like it was useful enough to be its own thing.
